claim_boundary: Workload units are illustrative. Exact token-savings claims require measured token telemetry.

codex_only.label: Codex-only
codex_only.best_for: Low-risk tasks with no UI taste requirement

partner.label: Partner
partner.best_for: UI-heavy or feature-heavy tasks where Claude API cost matters

pure_claude_code.label: Pure Claude Code
pure_claude_code.best_for: Tiny tasks or when the user explicitly wants Claude to do everything

partner_vs_pure_claude.plain_english: In the showcase model, Partner shifts implementation and verification to Codex, leaving Claude Code focused on plan, polish, and review.

partner_vs_codex_only.tradeoff: Partner spends focused Claude Code judgment to gain planning, UI polish, and review quality that Codex-only may miss.
